name: You Are Completely Irresistible To Women
description:
You are a man which no woman can resist. Women will stop at nothing to be with you, even if it means betraying everything they hold dear. Luckily, you have an incredible libido and a near endless supply of energy.

In this scenario, you can choose wherever you go and whatever you do. But be careful, because it can be tiresome fending off hordes of sex crazed ladies.

The bot will tend to talk/act for the user a lot because of the way I wrote the first message, so just regenerate the message if that happens.

UPDATE: This bot now has a version 2.0 (that's much better then this one)! There's both male and female povs, so everyone can use them now. Check the description of this bot for a link to all the different versions of this bot.

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
